command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time
cmd = "rg -n \"gsd-pi|Usage: gsd|\\[gsd\\]\" src tests package.json"
start = time.time()
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, text=True, capture_output=True)
dur = int((time.time()-start)*1000)
print(f"COMMAND: {cmd}")
print(f"EXIT_CODE: {proc.returncode}")
print(f"DURATION_MS: {dur}")
print(proc.stdout)
if proc.stderr:
    print("STDERR:")
    print(proc.stderr)
PY

command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time
cmd = "node --experimental-strip-types tests/parity/run.ts --format json"
start = time.time()
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, text=True, capture_output=True)
dur = int((time.time()-start)*1000)
print(f"COMMAND: {cmd}")
print(f"EXIT_CODE: {proc.returncode}")
print(f"DURATION_MS: {dur}")
print(proc.stdout[-4000:])
if proc.stderr:
    print("STDERR:")
    print(proc.stderr[-1000:])
PY

command:

import subprocess, time
cmd = "node --import ./src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/resolve-ts.mjs --experimental-strip-types --test src/tests/integration/secondary-surface-inventory-contract.test.ts"
start = time.time()
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, text=True, capture_output=True)
dur = int((time.time()-start)*1000)
print(f"COMMAND: {cmd}")
print(f"EXIT_CODE: {proc.returncode}")
print(f"DURATION_MS: {dur}")
print(proc.stdout)
if proc.stderr:
    print("STDERR:")
    print(proc.stderr)
PY
